item.title: 1969 Plymouth Barracuda Hemi Under Glass
item.description: A stunning 1969 Plymouth Barracuda Hemi preserved under glass showcases one of the most sought-after muscle car combinations of its era. What makes this rare classic worthy of such special treatment?

media:content.media:description: A stunning 1969 Plymouth Barracuda Hemi preserved under glass showcases one of the most sought-after muscle car combinations of its era. What makes this rare classic worthy of such special treatment?

item.title: New School Meets Old School: 2010 Morgan Aero
item.description: A look at the 2010 Morgan Aero, where modern performance meets classic styling. This showcase highlights the car’s unique design and the blend of old-school character with newer engineering.

item.title: Finding a 1971 AMC Hornet SC 360

item.title: 1963 Buick Electra 225 Convertible in White
item.description: A stunning 1963 Buick Electra 225 Convertible finished in elegant white showcases the luxury, style, and cruising comfort that defined Buick's flagship models of the era. What makes this classic convertible such a standout among early-1960s American cars?

item.title: 9-Year Build: 1953 Studebaker Commander
item.description: A 1953 Studebaker Commander reaches completion after a nine-year journey of restoration, craftsmanship, and dedication. Was the long wait worth the result?
